description_long: This object is a lush tomato plant with multiple green stems and branches, adorned with clusters of small, round, red tomatoes at various stages of ripeness. The plant features jagged, deeply lobed green leaves that are characteristic of the Solanum lycopersicum species. The tomatoes hang in bunches, some closer to the main stem and others extending outward on thinner branches. The stems are thick and sturdy, supporting the weight of the fruit and foliage. There is no visible pot or container, and the base of the plant appears to be cut or unfinished. The overall appearance suggests a healthy, fruit-bearing tomato plant suitable for urban gardens or patios.
description: A leafy tomato plant with clusters of red tomatoes and jagged green leaves, lacking a visible pot. The plant is vibrant and fruit-laden, with sturdy green stems.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main stem with several clusters of red tomatoes and dense green foliage.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the branching structure and more tomato clusters, with some stems extending outward.
description_view_2: Back view highlights the underside of the leaves and tomatoes hanging from the lower branches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays additional tomato clusters and the plant's overall spread.
